problem_statement: Implement slugify(title) in ts/slug.ts to turn a human-readable title into a URL slug. First remove apostrophes entirely — both ASCII ' and typographic ’ — so their neighbours join ("Don't" becomes "dont"). Then lowercase the text, replace every maximal run of characters outside a-z and 0-9 with a single hyphen, and trim any leading or trailing hyphens. A title containing no alphanumeric characters at all yields the empty string. Verify with bun test tests/ts/slug.
